item.title: First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.
item.description: First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.
item.guid: 2026-01-22/First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.

item.title: The Week Ahead: January 26-30, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans
item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 26-30, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.title: 👍Dave Hedrick - Ferry Conservation District
item.description: Dave Hedrick signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Ferry Conservation District.

item.title: 👍Jay Gordon - Washington State Dairy Federation
item.description: Jay Gordon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Dairy Federation.

item.title: 👍💵Mark Streuli - WA Cattlemen, WA Wheat Growers, WA Potato and Onion Assoc.
item.description: Mark Streuli signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Cattlemen, WA Wheat Growers, WA Potato and Onion Assoc.. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Kelly McLain - Washington State Dept. of Agriculture
item.description: Kelly McLain signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Dept. of Agriculture.

item.title: AGNR - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: AGNR - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-14/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 95; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 95; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 1.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
